    Screen Recording Made Simple

    Record, Share &
    Collaborate Instantly

    Capture your screen, add context, and share with your team — all in one beautiful platform. No downloads required.

    Easy Upload

    Drag & drop your recordings with multipart upload for reliability.

    Team Workspaces

    Invite teammates, manage roles, and collaborate on recordings.

    Secure Sharing

    Share via public links or keep recordings private to your team.

    How it works

    Create and share polished videos in minutes.

    01

    Record or Upload

    Capture your screen instantly or upload existing clips.

    02

    Auto Process

    We process your videos and generate thumbnails automatically.

    03

    Share & Collaborate

    Send secure links, manage visibility, and work together.

    Start free, then scale with advanced collaboration and limits.

    Frequently asked questions

    Do teammates need an account to view videos?

    Public links can be viewed without an account, while private workspace content requires access.

    Can I control video visibility?

    Yes. You can keep videos private or generate public links depending on your workflow.

    Is there a team workspace model?

    Yes. Invite members, manage roles, and collaborate under shared workspace settings.

    Start recording in seconds

    Create your first workspace and share your first video today.
